events.name: Trump Iran deadline
events.notes: Escalation (→$130-150) or deadline extension (→consolidation). Reduce 20% exposure 24h before.

events.name: BRENTOIL contract roll BZM6→BZN6
events.notes: Extreme backwardation ($25+) makes this significant. April 7-13 window. Reduce 30% 48h before.

events.name: BRENTOIL contract roll end
events.notes: End of BZM6→BZN6 roll period. Reassess position after roll completes.

events.name: OPEC+ Meeting
events.notes: OPEC+ production decisions. Any output increase commitment is bearish near-term.

events.name: US CPI (March)
events.notes: Hot CPI = higher for longer rates = risk off. Affects BTC and broad risk.

events.name: FOMC Minutes (March meeting)
events.notes: Hawkish tilt = risk off. Dovish = risk on.

events.name: US Q1 GDP advance estimate
events.notes: Weak GDP + high oil = stagflation narrative. Strong GDP = demand holds despite oil shock.

events.name: FOMC Decision (May)
events.notes: Rate decision. Stagflation dilemma: cut into inflation or hold into weakness.

events.name: Estimated US SPR exhaustion
events.notes: If SPR release continues at 3.4M bpd, runs out ~July. Supply gap reappears hard.

events.name: BTC options mega-expiry (quarterly)
events.notes: Quarterly options expiry — max pain pin possible. Elevated vol into expiry.
